prestazioni: Engine swap to M20B25 (2.5L inline-6 from E30 325i) with Schrick 272° camshafts, 36lb/hr Bosch Motorsport injectors, and a custom 3.5" intake manifold from a 325iS for improved airflow and throttle response

Forced induction via a Garrett T25 turbocharger (internally gated, .48 A/R turbine housing) on a custom log manifold with a 38mm external wastegate (Tial MV-R), paired with a custom air-to-water intercooler (Spearco IC-77) and a Pierburg 044 fuel pump for boosted applications up to 12 psi

Custom Motronic 1.3 ECU remap by DynoMotion (KMotion) with a standalone PnP adapter harness, featuring individual cylinder trims, launch control, and a 3.91 LSD from a 325iX for optimized power delivery and traction
estetica: Rocket Bunny V1 E30 widebody kit with custom carbon fiber front splitter and rear diffuser, paired with OEM+ E30 M3 Sport Evolution rear spoiler for aggressive aero balance
BBS RS 16x8 ET20 (front) and 16x9 ET15 (rear) wheels with 225/45/16 and 245/40/16 Nankang AR-1 semi-slick tires, mounted on custom polybushings for track-focused alignment

Full OEM Euro-spec E30 323i interior swap with Recaro SRD front seats (Schroth 4-point harnesses), M-Tech 2 steering wheel, and a custom half-cage (Autopower bolt-in) with integrated fire suppression system (Lifeline Zero 360)
